channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Greatly increases the threat the elements pose, blizzards, hurricanes, monsoons. Get ready!

item.title: Temporal Prospector
item.description: Temporal Prospector This mod adds a new prospecting pick known as the temporal prospecting pick. ...

item.title: Translocator Locator Redux
item.description: Adds configurable, craftable locators to locate translocators. And ruins.

item.title: Achievements
item.description: Adds vanilla, lore, AllClasses, Hod and Primitive Survival Achievements and random rewards

item.title: Bannerdoria Fork (Changed Names)
item.description: The bannerdoria mod without Bannerdorian names.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Vulkan's Combat Overhaul Patches
item.description: Tweaks and Patches for some less popular features of Combat Overhaul

item.title: Eriadorian Armory
item.description: A collection of custom weapons and armors for the Kingdom of Eriador Vintagestory server.

item.title: Archipelago Client
item.description: A simple integration of Vintage Story with Archipelago Multiworld Randomizer.

item.title: MultiClass Reborn
item.description: A replacement for Multiclass, fully backwards compatible allowing multiple classes

item.title: Rudiments
item.description: Pre-industrial craft, done properly. Fibre, clay, kilns, stone tools, mud — one step at a time.

item.title: Pico Recipes
item.description: A QoL recipe mod (still in developement)

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: Trait Acquirer Modded Class Support
item.description: Rewritten Trait Acquirer to allow all modded classes

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Craft-a-Bell
item.description: Craftable Fren that can alert you to nearby enemies, times of day, and hold messages.

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Mirrors
item.description: Adds "simple" mirror blocks to the game

item.title: Vanilla More Molds 2.1.0
item.description: Adds new molds while staying true to the spirit and mechanics of the base game!

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: Renderer Mangler
item.description: Custom cubemap renderer with different projections that allows up to 360 FOV

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Craft a Quartermaster's Desk that acts as a remote terminal for every container around it.

item.title: Double Beds
item.description: Allows combining 2 beds of the same type in the crafting grid to obtain a double bed.

item.title: Quick Find
item.description: Allows you to search for items in open inventories.

item.title: Cozy Pierzynas
item.description: Adds new uses for feathers. Pillows and duvets in many colors.

item.title: Crockwrights of Eriador
item.description: Crafting recipes for many ceramic pieces

item.title: Mini's Assorted Patches
item.description: Buncha changes for a LAN

item.title: One Hour, One Life
item.description: Made for the server "Humankind". This mod aims to recreate features from "One Hour, One life"

item.title: TAROT CARDS
item.description: Adds a pickable tarot card on character creation
